MultiDutyÂź Oil Bath Filter.description: The AAF MultiDuty is an automated viscous air filter used in diesel and gas engine applications. This robust and reliable filtration system does not require filter elements and requires very little maintenance. The oil in this heavy-duty system is specially formulated for filtration and is nontoxic and odorless. It maintains its dust-trapping characteristics over an extended period of time and dust will not break away and be carried downstream.Learn more
